---
title: Molstar (Mol*)
---

The `Mol*` extension [https://github.com/jmbuhr/quarto-molstar]([https://github.com/jmbuhr/quarto-molstar]) allows including 
an interactive protein viewer in the a document. 

A protein can be included with the short code

```{.txt shortcodes=false}
{{< mol-rcsb 7sgl >}}
```

{{< mol-rcsb 7sgl >}}

In some cases this could be a much more interesting way of seeing a protein compared to still figures. 
See many more examples [here](https://jmbuhr.de/quarto-molstar/).

## Technical details

Installing the extension is simple, in the Quarto root run 

```
quarto install extension jmbuhr/quarto-molstar
```

This will install the extension under `_extensions` and enable the shortcodes.
